description: Style noteAn all-time favourite accessory, belts are an integral part of creating the well groomed look. This leatherette belt from turtle is set to add an sophisticated edge to your style. Also, every time you purchase a Turtle product, part of the proceeds go towards protecting and conserving turtles. This is part of the Save Turtle project created in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa. Product DetailsBlack textured leatherette belt with a press claspHoles to customise the Fit Material and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality if necessary SizeLength: 119 cm
